200.description: Successfully connected to the SSE stream

209.description: Actually does not respond with status code. The response is the stream of event to subscribers. The events are the [The Application Base Event](/#/schemas/application-event) object in form of [GoAPI Task Processed](/#/schemas/application-goapi-task-processed-event) event. The SSE end is denoted by '\n\n' (double new line sign).
